title: Silenced
tmdbOverview: Based on actual events that took place at Gwangju Inhwa School for the hearing-impaired, where young deaf students were the victims of repeated sexual assaults by faculty members over a period of five years in the early 2000s.
synopsis: Silenced is a 2011 drama and k-drama film from South Korea. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.0 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 18 certification (FR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
